title: NYISO Load Forecast Hourly CSV download
description:
⚠️ This dataset is deprecated in favor of  [nyiso_zonal_load_forecast_hourly](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/nyiso_zonal_load_forecast_hourly) which contains this same system wide forecast alongside the zonal load forecasts. 

Load Forecast in 1 hour intervals as reported by NYISO.

Published by 8am ET each day.
